title: feat: add GPT 5.6 and Seedream 5 Pro
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds GPT 5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna on Azure East US.
- Makes GPT 5.6 models quest-eligible with `priceMultiplier: 0.7`.
- Adds Seedream 5 Pro on Replicate as paid-only at the 2K image price.
- Updates docs, aliases, effective-price snapshots, and Seedream Replicate coverage.

Validation:
- `npm run test -- test/image/seedreamModel.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/aliases.test.ts test/effective-prices.snapshot.test.ts`
- `npm run test -- test/text/transforms/parameterProcessor.test.ts`
- Local end-to-end checks for GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna text and image input.
- Local end-to-end checks for Seedream 5 Pro text and reference-image input.

gist.headline: Fresh seeds in the garden
gist.blurb: GPT 5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna) and Seedream 5 Pro have landed in the API. More ways to turn your prompts into pixels and poetry.
gist.summary: Added GPT 5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna) via Azure East US with quest eligibility, and Seedream 5 Pro via Replicate as a paid-only image model.
gist.impact: You can now prompt the GPT 5.6 family at a 0.7x price multiplier, or generate images with Seedream 5 Pro at the standard 2K image price.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee planting glowing seeds (Seedream) and interacting with a futuristic sun/earth/moon mobile (Sol, Terra, Luna) in a cozy garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee planting glowing seeds in a digital garden while a futuristic sun, earth, and moon mobile spins above. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee planting glowing seeds in a digital garden while a futuristic sun, earth, and moon mobile spins above. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
